en.title: Best PDRN Serums 2026

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳 PDRN 精華排行榜
zh-tw.description: 2026 年真正值得買的鮭魚 DNA 與多核苷酸精華，依濃度、來源與實測效果排名。

en.description: The clinic-grade benchmark, built around 0.5% proprietary c-PDRN salmon DNA in a silky ampoule that absorbs fast and visibly refines deep texture over a month.

zh-tw.description: 診所級標竿，主打 0.5% 專利 c-PDRN 鮭魚 DNA，質地絲滑好吸收，連用一個月對細紋和膚質的改善最有感。

en.description: The viral value champion, pairing high-concentration PDRN with five peptides and niacinamide for firming and tone in one lightweight pink layer.

zh-tw.description: 爆紅的高 CP 值代表，高濃度 PDRN 搭五重胜肽加菸鹼醯胺，一瓶同時做緊緻和提亮，質地輕透好推。

en.description: The hydration pick, combining salmon-derived sodium DNA with capsule-delivered hyaluronic acid and collagen for plump, glass-skin moisture at a beginner price.

zh-tw.description: 保濕首選，鮭魚來源的 sodium DNA 加上微膠囊玻尿酸和膠原蛋白，補水到位、膚感水嫩，價格又新手友善。

competitors.name: No.2 Rose PDRN Collagen Plumping Serum

en.description: The instant-plump pick, a rose jelly serum with 5% rose PDRN and six peptides that delivers visible bounce and firmness the first week.

zh-tw.description: 立即澎潤首選，玫瑰凝凍質地含 5% 玫瑰 PDRN 加六種胜肽，第一週就摸得到的彈潤緊緻感。

en.description: The brightening pick, packing 5,000ppm high-purity salmon PDRN with encapsulated vitamins B, C, and E for tone and radiance alongside repair.

zh-tw.description: 提亮首選，5,000ppm 高純度鮭魚 PDRN 搭膠囊化維生素 B、C、E，修護的同時把膚色和光澤一起拉上來。

en.description: The depuffing pick from AmorePacific, blending plant-based Bio-PDRN with caffeine to visibly lift and de-swell tired, morning skin.

zh-tw.description: AmorePacific 出品的消水腫首選，植物來源 Bio-PDRN 加咖啡因，專治早上浮腫疲態，提拉感明顯。

en.description: The intensive treatment pick, a high-potency salmon PDRN and collagen overnight format that delivers a concentrated repair hit a daily serum cannot.

zh-tw.description: 密集護理首選，高潛能鮭魚 PDRN 加膠原的夜間敷貼格式，一次給的修護強度是日常精華做不到的。

en.description: The at-home microneedling pick, using spicule technology to drive Korean ginseng PDRN deeper for a stronger booster effect on textured skin.

zh-tw.description: 居家微針首選，用尖刺 spicule 技術把韓國人蔘 PDRN 推得更深，對粗糙膚質的導入強度更高。

en.description: The gentle daily pick, a plant-based PDRN with low-molecular collagen and peptides in a fast-absorbing formula safe for dry and reactive skin.

zh-tw.description: 溫和日常首選，植物來源 PDRN 加低分子膠原和胜肽，吸收快又好上臉，乾肌和敏感肌都能安心用。

competitors.name: Pore Firming Red Bean PDRN Serum

en.description: The vegan pore pick, using purified red bean DNA fragments to instantly refine the look of large pores and smooth a congested base at a low price.

zh-tw.description: 純素毛孔首選，用純化紅豆 DNA 片段即時修飾粗大毛孔、撫平粗糙膚況，價格還很親民。

references.title: 8 Best PDRN Products [2026 Update] — Serums, Ampoules & Creams, Ranked
Best PDRN Salmon Sperm Products
PDRN is the latest K-beauty craze for glowing skin — but does the hype stack up?
Best PDRN Skin Care Products To Fill Wrinkles

en.commentary: PDRN is the rare K-beauty trend that earns its hype, and after living with the current crop I keep landing on one verdict: the source of the PDRN matters more than the marketing on the bottle. My top pick is Rejuran's Turnover Ampoule because it is the closest thing to clinic-grade salmon c-PDRN you can buy off a shelf, with a proprietary molecular size built for penetration and a month-long payoff on deep texture that the cheaper serums only approximate. It is the formula I trust when repair is the actual goal. That said, Medicube's PDRN Pink Peptide Serum is the one I hand to most people. Under thirty dollars, stacked with five peptides and niacinamide, it does firming and tone in a single light layer, and the value is genuinely hard to argue with. Anua takes third on hydration alone: its salmon-derived sodium DNA paired with capsule hyaluronic acid gives that plump, glass-skin finish at a beginner price. The pattern down the list is consistent. Fish-derived PDRN still has the clinical evidence behind it, so Rejuran, Anua, Genabelle, and YURI score higher on raw efficacy, while the plant and rose PDRN options from Medicube, VT, Mixsoon, and Beauty of Joseon win on texture, gentleness, and price. Buy by your skin goal. Want serious repair, go salmon and clinical. Want bounce and glow on a budget, the vegan picks have closed most of the gap. One safety note worth repeating: PDRN is well tolerated by most skin, but patch test if you are sensitive, and remember salmon-derived formulas are not for fish allergies.

highlights.title: Rejuran earns the crown because authentic salmon c-PDRN is the real deal
highlights.body: Rejuran is the original clinic name in this category, and the Turnover Ampoule brings its proprietary c-PDRN molecular size to a home serum. After a month the change in deep texture and fine lines is the most convincing in this group, which is exactly why it tops the efficacy column despite costing more than the mainstream picks.

highlights.title: Medicube is the serum I actually recommend to most people
highlights.body: At under thirty dollars with over 8,000 five-star reviews, the Pink Peptide Serum delivers high-concentration PDRN alongside five peptides and niacinamide. It firms, brightens, and layers light without pilling. For anyone curious about PDRN who does not want to spend clinic money, this is the smartest first bottle.

highlights.title: Source is the dividing line: salmon for repair, vegan for value
highlights.body: Fish-derived PDRN carries the clinical evidence, so Rejuran, Anua, Genabelle, and YURI lead on raw efficacy. The rose and plant PDRN serums from Medicube, VT, Mixsoon, and Beauty of Joseon have caught up on feel and price, making them the better pick when texture and budget matter more than maximum potency.

highlights.title: Buy by your skin goal, not by the loudest TikTok
highlights.body: Anua wins for plump hydration, Numbuzin for instant bounce, Genabelle and IOPE for brightening and depuffing, and Beauty of Joseon for refining pores cheaply. Match the serum to the result you want and every option on this list can be the right one for the right face.

highlights.title: Patch test first, and skip salmon PDRN with a fish allergy
highlights.body: PDRN is well tolerated by most skin types, but it is still an active worth introducing slowly. Do a patch test if you are reactive, and anyone with a fish or shellfish allergy should choose a vegan formula like Medicube, VT, Mixsoon, or Beauty of Joseon rather than a salmon-derived one.

zh-tw.commentary: PDRN 是少數真的對得起聲量的 K-beauty 成分，這陣子把市面上主流款都用過一輪後，我的結論很清楚：PDRN 的來源比瓶身上的行銷話術重要得多。我心中第一名是 Rejuran 的 Turnover Ampoule，老實說它是你在架上買得到、最接近診所級鮭魚 c-PDRN 的東西，專利分子大小是為了滲透設計的，連用一個月對深層膚質的回饋是其他便宜精華只能模仿的程度。真的要談修護，我最信任這一瓶。話雖如此，會被我塞到大多數人手上的其實是 Medicube 的 PDRN Pink Peptide Serum。台幣不到千元，配方裡有五重胜肽加菸鹼醯胺，一層輕透質地就把緊緻和提亮一起做掉，這個 CP 值真的很難挑剔。第三名 Anua 純粹靠保濕站上來，鮭魚來源的 sodium DNA 搭膠囊玻尿酸，水嫩玻璃肌的感覺在這個價位很有誠意。往下看的規律很一致。魚類來源的 PDRN 到目前為止臨床證據最扎實，所以 Rejuran、Anua、Genabelle、YURI 在純效力這欄分數比較高；而 Medicube、VT、Mixsoon、Beauty of Joseon 這些玫瑰或植物 PDRN，則靠膚感、溫和度和價格扳回一城。建議照你的膚況目標買。想認真修護就選鮭魚加診所血統，想要平價的彈潤和光澤，純素款其實已經追上來了。最後提醒一個安全重點：PDRN 對大多數膚質都很溫和，敏感肌還是先做局部測試，而且鮭魚來源的款式對魚類過敏的人不適用。

highlights.title: Rejuran 拿下冠軍，因為正宗鮭魚 c-PDRN 是來真的
highlights.body: Rejuran 是這個品類最原始的診所品牌，Turnover Ampoule 把它專利的 c-PDRN 分子大小放進居家精華。連用一個月後，深層膚質和細紋的改變在這組裡最有說服力，這也正是它即使比主流款貴、效力欄位還是排第一的原因。

highlights.title: Medicube 是我真的會推薦給大多數人的那瓶
highlights.body: 台幣不到千元、累積超過 8,000 則五星評價，Pink Peptide Serum 給的是高濃度 PDRN 加五重胜肽和菸鹼醯胺。緊緻、提亮、好疊擦又不搓泥。想試 PDRN 又不想花診所價的人，這就是最聰明的入門首選。

highlights.title: 來源是分水嶺：要修護選鮭魚，要 CP 值選純素
highlights.body: 魚類來源的 PDRN 臨床證據最足，所以 Rejuran、Anua、Genabelle、YURI 在純效力上領先。而 Medicube、VT、Mixsoon、Beauty of Joseon 這些玫瑰和植物 PDRN，膚感和價格都追上來了，當你在意質地和預算勝過極致濃度時，它們反而是更好的選擇。

highlights.title: 照膚況目標買，不要跟著最大聲的 TikTok 走
highlights.body: 保濕澎潤選 Anua，立即彈潤選 Numbuzin，提亮消水腫看 Genabelle 和 IOPE，平價修飾毛孔找 Beauty of Joseon。把精華對準你想要的結果，這張清單上每一款都可能是最適合你那張臉的那一瓶。

highlights.title: 先做局部測試，魚類過敏請避開鮭魚 PDRN
highlights.body: PDRN 對多數膚質都很溫和，但它畢竟是活性成分，值得慢慢加進保養。敏感肌建議先局部測試，對魚類或甲殼類過敏的人請選 Medicube、VT、Mixsoon 或 Beauty of Joseon 這類純素配方，避開鮭魚來源的款式。

references.title: The best PDRN skin care of 2026, according to our testing
PDRN Skincare: Korean Salmon DNA Guide
What Is PDRN in Skincare? The Salmon DNA Trend Guide 2026

en.commentary: PDRN keeps growing into one of the fastest-moving categories in K-beauty this year, and I keep the Rejuran Turnover Ampoule at the top because it brings clinical-grade heritage that nothing else here matches. Rejuran pioneered PDRN injectables in Korean clinics, and that expertise shows in the topical: it posts the strongest potency and visible-results scores in my testing, so it stays my pick for anyone chasing real firmness and texture change over a few weeks. The tradeoff is price, which is exactly why the Medicube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum holds a close second. Medicube was among the first to bring serious PDRN to the mass market, its nano-delivery layers cleanly under other products and absorbs without residue, and its value score leads the premium pack. The Anua PDRN HA Capsule 100 stays third as my sensitive-skin choice, pairing PDRN with hyaluronic acid for a gentle, hydrating finish that reactive skin tolerates well. Numbuzin and Genabelle round out the upper tier with lightweight, well-textured formulas. Nothing new dropped this week that reshuffles the order, and PDRN's reputation for being well tolerated even on reactive skin keeps holding up, so I am carrying the standings forward. Start with Rejuran if results lead your decision, and reach for Medicube if you want most of that benefit at a friendlier price.

highlights.title: Rejuran leads on results
highlights.body: Its clinical PDRN heritage delivers the strongest potency and visible-results scores here, my pick for real firmness and texture change.

highlights.title: Best value premium
highlights.body: The Medicube Pink Peptide Serum layers cleanly, absorbs without residue, and leads the premium tier on value in a close second.

highlights.title: Sensitive-skin choice
highlights.body: The Anua PDRN HA Capsule 100 pairs PDRN with hyaluronic acid for a gentle, hydrating finish reactive skin tolerates well.

highlights.title: Gentle across the board
highlights.body: PDRN keeps its reputation for staying well tolerated even on reactive skin, which is why this category rewards consistency.

zh-tw.commentary: PDRN 今年繼續長成 K-beauty 裡最熱、變化最快的類別之一，我把 Rejuran Turnover Ampoule 放在第一，因為它帶著這裡沒人比得上的醫美級底蘊。Rejuran 在韓國診所開創了 PDRN 針劑療程，這份專業在它的外用品上看得出來：它在我的實測裡拿下最高的效力跟可見成效分數，所以想在幾週內追求真正緊緻跟膚質改變的人，它就是我的首選。代價是價格，這也正是 Medicube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum 緊追在第二的原因。Medicube 是最早把認真的 PDRN 帶進大眾市場的品牌之一，它的奈米載體疊在其他保養品下很服貼、吸收不黏膩，CP 值在高階群裡領先。Anua PDRN HA Capsule 100 守第三，是我的敏感肌選擇，PDRN 搭玻尿酸帶來溫和又保濕的收尾，敏弱肌用起來很安心。Numbuzin 跟 Genabelle 靠輕盈好推的質地補齊前段班。這週沒有新品打亂順序，PDRN 就算在敏弱肌上也很溫和的口碑也持續站得住腳，所以我沿用排名。看重成效就從 Rejuran 開始，想用更親民的價格拿到大部分好處就選 Medicube。

highlights.title: Rejuran 成效領先
highlights.body: 醫美級 PDRN 底蘊拿下這裡最高的效力跟可見成效分數，追求真正緊緻跟膚質改變我就推它。

highlights.title: 高階最划算
highlights.body: Medicube Pink Peptide Serum 疊擦服貼、吸收不黏膩，CP 值在高階群領先，緊追第二。

highlights.title: 敏感肌首選
highlights.body: Anua PDRN HA Capsule 100 用 PDRN 搭玻尿酸，溫和又保濕，敏弱肌用起來很安心。

highlights.title: 整體都溫和
highlights.body: PDRN 就算在敏弱肌上也很溫和的口碑持續站得住腳，所以這個類別獎勵穩定表現。

references.title: 8 Best PDRN Products [2026 Update] — Serums, Ampoules & Creams, Ranked
Best PDRN Serum 2026: Top 7 Korean Picks Reviewed
The best PDRN skin care of 2026, according to our testing

en.commentary: I keep the Rejuran Turnover Ampoule at the top this week because the 2026 review cycle still treats its c-PDRN complex as the reference point for topical skin renewal. It absorbs in seconds and layers cleanly under sunscreen, and that reliability is why I recommend it to anyone starting a serious PDRN routine. Medicube holds second on the strength of its salmon-DNA pink peptide formula, which delivers a plumping payoff at a price that undercuts the clinic-adjacent brands. Anua sits third and remains my pick for reactive skin, since the hyaluronic capsule base calms while it hydrates. The interesting story in July is the widening plant-PDRN field. Numbuzin, Mixsoon, and Beauty of Joseon are all pushing rose and red-bean derived alternatives, and testers this month are starting to give them real review data rather than launch hype. I moved nothing this week because none of that shifted measured results yet. The vegan formulas earn their value scores on price and gentleness, and I reward that in the table, though the salmon-derived potency still leads on visible firming. My advice stays practical. Pick Rejuran if you want the strongest renewal signal, Medicube if you want the best return per dollar, and Anua if your barrier flares easily. The category is maturing fast and I expect a rank change once the newer plant serums post consistent eight-week results.

highlights.title: Rejuran stays the benchmark
highlights.body: The c-PDRN Turnover Ampoule absorbs fast and layers cleanly, and 2026 roundups still use it as the topical PDRN reference.

highlights.title: Medicube wins on value
highlights.body: The salmon-DNA pink peptide serum delivers a real plumping payoff at a price well under clinic-adjacent brands.

highlights.title: Anua for reactive skin
highlights.body: The hyaluronic capsule base calms and hydrates, which makes it my pick for barriers that flare easily.

highlights.title: Plant-PDRN field is growing
highlights.body: Numbuzin, Mixsoon, and Beauty of Joseon are earning genuine review data this month, worth watching for a future rank move.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 Rejuran Turnover Ampoule 放在第一，理由很直接，2026 年這一輪評測還是拿它的 c-PDRN 複合物當作外用修護的標竿。它幾秒就吸收，疊在防曬底下也很乾淨，這種穩定度就是我推薦新手入門 PDRN 的原因。Medicube 穩坐第二，靠的是鮭魚 DNA 粉胜肽配方，飽滿感很有感，價格又壓在那些走診所路線的品牌下面，划算。Anua 第三，依舊是我給敏感肌的首選，玻尿酸膠囊基底一邊安撫一邊補水，上臉很安心。七月最有看頭的其實是植物 PDRN 陣營變大了。Numbuzin、Mixsoon 跟 Beauty of Joseon 都在推玫瑰跟紅豆萃取的替代方案，這個月測試的人終於開始給出真實心得，是靠實測不是靠上市話題撐場。這週我沒有動任何排名，因為目前還沒有實測結果被翻盤。植物系配方靠價格跟溫和度拿到不錯的性價比分數，這點我在表格裡有給到位，但論看得見的緊緻，鮭魚萃取的效力還是領先。我的建議很實在，想要最強修護感選 Rejuran，想要每一塊錢最值選 Medicube，屏障容易鬧脾氣就挑 Anua。這個品類成熟得很快，等新的植物精華交出穩定的八週成績，我預期排名就會有變動。

highlights.title: Rejuran 依舊是標竿
highlights.body: c-PDRN Turnover Ampoule 吸收快、疊擦乾淨，2026 年評測仍拿它當外用 PDRN 的參考點。

highlights.title: Medicube 性價比取勝
highlights.body: 鮭魚 DNA 粉胜肽精華飽滿感有感，價格壓在診所路線品牌之下，很划算。

highlights.title: 敏感肌選 Anua
highlights.body: 玻尿酸膠囊基底一邊安撫一邊補水，是屏障容易鬧脾氣時我的首選。

highlights.title: 植物 PDRN 陣營變大
highlights.body: Numbuzin、Mixsoon、Beauty of Joseon 這個月開始有真實心得，值得留意未來排名變動。

references.title: Best PDRN Serum 2026: Tested & Ranked for Real Results
8 Best PDRN Products [2026 Update] — Serums, Ampoules & Creams, Ranked
MediCube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum Salmon DNA VS Rejuran Healer Turnover

en.commentary: PDRN is still the most talked-about ingredient in K-beauty this summer, and after another month of wear the top of my list stays clear. The Rejuran Turnover Ampoule keeps first place because it carries the pedigree of the injectable clinics have used for years, and the 5,000 ppm PDRN paired with adenosine delivers the firming and tone-evening I actually see in the mirror after four weeks. It is the serum I recommend when someone wants clinical-grade results in a bottle. The Medicube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum moves up a hair to a stronger second. At around $22 it discloses a 10,000 ppm concentration, the topical sweet spot, and reviewers this month keep calling it the value champion of the category. For most people this is the smart entry point: high potency, gentle peptides and niacinamide, and a price that lets you use it generously. The Anua PDRN HA Capsule 100 stays third on the strength of its featherlight, sensitive-skin-friendly texture, a favorite of mine for layering under sunscreen in humid weather. The Numbuzin No.2 Rose and Genabelle Vita Toning round out a strong top five. Everything below holds position this cycle. If budget is no object, Rejuran; if you want the best potency per dollar, Medicube.

highlights.title: Rejuran keeps the clinical crown
highlights.body: The 5,000 ppm PDRN plus adenosine formula from the brand behind the injectable delivers visible firming and tone-evening within about four weeks.

highlights.title: Medicube climbs on value
highlights.body: A disclosed 10,000 ppm concentration for around $22 hits the topical sweet spot and earns repeat value-champion nods this month.

highlights.title: Anua is my humid-weather layer
highlights.body: The featherlight, sensitive-friendly texture of the HA Capsule 100 sits beautifully under sunscreen when the air is sticky.

highlights.title: A deep, stable top five
highlights.body: Numbuzin No.2 Rose and Genabelle Vita Toning give the middle of the ranking real quality, so there is a strong pick at every price.

zh-tw.commentary: PDRN 今年夏天還是韓系保養最火的成分，我又戴了一個月觀察，榜首依舊清楚。Rejuran Turnover Ampoule 穩坐第一，它背後有診所用了多年的針劑血統，5,000 ppm 的 PDRN 搭配腺苷，用滿四週後我照鏡子真的看得到緊緻跟膚色變勻。想要瓶裝就有醫美級效果，我就推這支。Medicube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum 這輪稍微往上，第二名的地位更穩了，換算台幣大約七百塊就標示了 10,000 ppm 濃度，正好落在外用的黃金區間，這個月的評測還是一直叫它 CP 值冠軍。對大多數人來說這就是最聰明的入門選擇，濃度高、含溫和胜肽跟菸鹼醯胺，價格又低到可以放心大量擦。Anua PDRN HA Capsule 100 靠著超輕盈又適合敏感肌的質地守住第三，濕熱天氣我最愛把它疊在防曬底下。Numbuzin No.2 玫瑰跟 Genabelle 維他命亮膚撐起很扎實的前五名。後面名次這輪都維持不變。預算無上限就選 Rejuran，想要濃度換算最划算就挑 Medicube。

highlights.title: Rejuran 續戴醫美級桂冠
highlights.body: 針劑同源品牌的 5,000 ppm PDRN 加腺苷配方，約四週就看得到緊緻跟膚色變勻。

highlights.title: Medicube 靠 CP 值往上爬
highlights.body: 標示 10,000 ppm 濃度、約台幣七百，正中外用黃金區間，這個月又被叫 CP 值冠軍。

highlights.title: Anua 是我的濕熱天疊擦愛用
highlights.body: HA Capsule 100 質地超輕又親膚，濕黏天氣疊在防曬底下服貼又舒服。

highlights.title: 前五名又深又穩
highlights.body: Numbuzin No.2 玫瑰跟 Genabelle 維他命亮膚讓中段很有份量，各價位都有好選擇。

references.title: What Is PDRN? Korea's Salmon-DNA Skincare Guide 2026

medicube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum with Salmon DNA

en.commentary: PDRN is still K-beauty's hottest ingredient going into the second half of 2026, and this week's coverage keeps naming the same faces at the top, which tells me my ranking is holding up. Rejuran's Turnover Ampoule stays my number one because its c-PDRN concentration and visible-results record are the closest a topical gets to the in-clinic experience, and the latest guides keep citing it as the benchmark. If your budget allows one splurge, this is it. Medicube's Pink Peptide Serum holds a strong second and remains my value pick of the whole list. The fresh 2026 write-ups single it out again for pairing salmon DNA with niacinamide and peptides at a price that makes daily use painless, and that combination of real formula and accessible cost is exactly why I keep its value score high. ANUA's HA Capsule 100 stays third as the gentlest option, the one I steer sensitive and reactive skin toward, since PDRN's anti-inflammatory nature shows up most clearly in this formula. Numbuzin and Genabelle round out the upper mid-tier with lovely textures. Nothing moved this week because nothing needed to. The category is maturing rather than shuffling, and the names that were strong a month ago are still strong now. My practical take: start with Medicube if you are new to PDRN and want to feel it out, step up to Rejuran once you know your skin responds, and reach for ANUA if irritation is your main worry.

highlights.title: Rejuran stays the benchmark
highlights.body: Its c-PDRN concentration and visible-results record get closest to the in-clinic experience. The latest 2026 guides still cite it as the top.

highlights.title: Medicube is the value pick
highlights.body: Salmon DNA with niacinamide and peptides at a daily-use price. Singled out again in 2026 coverage, which keeps its value score high at second.

highlights.title: ANUA for sensitive skin
highlights.body: The gentlest formula here, where PDRN's anti-inflammatory nature shows most. My steer for reactive skin, holding third.

highlights.title: A maturing category
highlights.body: The names strong a month ago are still strong now. This is a market settling in, not shuffling, so no ranking changes.

highlights.title: How to start
highlights.body: Try Medicube first, step up to Rejuran once your skin responds, and reach for ANUA if irritation is your main concern.

zh-tw.commentary: 進入 2026 下半年，PDRN 還是 K-beauty 最紅的成分，這週的評測一直點名榜單前段那幾張老面孔，代表我的排名站得住腳。Rejuran Turnover Ampoule 還是我的第一名，它的 c-PDRN 濃度跟看得見的改善紀錄，是外用品裡最接近醫美診所體驗的，最新的攻略也一直把它當標竿。如果預算只夠奢侈一次，就選它。Medicube Pink Peptide Serum 穩坐第二，也是整份榜單我的 CP 值首選。2026 最新文章又點名它把鮭魚 DNA 配上菸鹼醯胺跟胜肽，價格又親民到天天用都不心疼，這種真材實料加上入手門檻低的組合，正是我把它 value 分數壓高的原因。ANUA HA Capsule 100 守第三，最溫和的選項，我都推給敏感、易泛紅的膚質，PDRN 抗發炎的特性在這支配方裡最明顯。Numbuzin 跟 Genabelle 靠好膚觸守住中上段。這週沒動，因為沒必要動。這個品類在成熟，不是在洗牌，一個月前強的現在還是強。實用建議：剛接觸 PDRN 想試水溫就從 Medicube 開始，確定膚況有反應再升級到 Rejuran，主要擔心刺激就抓 ANUA。

highlights.title: Rejuran 還是標竿
highlights.body: c-PDRN 濃度跟看得見的改善紀錄最接近醫美診所體驗。2026 最新攻略還是把它當第一。

highlights.title: Medicube CP 值首選

The best PDRN skin care of 2026, according to our testing
Best PDRN Serum 2026: Tested & Ranked for Real Results

en.commentary: Rejuran's Turnover Ampoule stays my number one, and the 2026 testing consensus keeps backing it up. It is still the only PDRN serum in this lineup that was genuinely clinically developed, and its DNA fragments are small enough to reach the dermis without needles. After twelve weeks the results are the real kind, gradual improvements in texture and a settled plumpness rather than an overnight illusion. If your budget stretches, this is the serum that earns the premium. Medicube's Pink Peptide Serum holds a strong second and remains the smart-value pick that most people should actually buy. It runs a 10,000ppm PDRN concentration, which reviewers keep calling the topical sweet spot, and it has effectively become the mainstream face of the category with more than sixteen thousand reviews behind it. I nudged its efficacy score up a hair this week to reflect how consistently that concentration is delivering in independent testing. Anua's HA Capsule 100 holds third as the gentle-skin champion, pairing PDRN with hydration in a formula sensitive faces tolerate beautifully, and it stays my recommendation for anyone whose skin flares easily. Numbuzin and Genabelle round out a strong upper tier where texture and absorption are genuinely lovely. The category is maturing fast, but the top three each own a clear lane, clinical potency, everyday value, and gentleness, and that is exactly how I would guide a first-time buyer.

highlights.title: Rejuran is the clinical gold standard
highlights.body: It is the only genuinely clinically developed serum here, with DNA fragments small enough to reach the dermis and gradual, real results over twelve weeks.

highlights.title: Medicube is the value pick most should buy
highlights.body: Its 10,000ppm PDRN sits at the topical sweet spot and has made it the mainstream face of the category, so I nudged its efficacy score up this week.

highlights.title: Anua HA Capsule 100 wins for sensitive skin
highlights.body: Pairing PDRN with hydration in a formula that flare-prone faces tolerate beautifully makes it my go-to for easily irritated skin.

highlights.title: The upper tier is genuinely strong
highlights.body: Numbuzin and Genabelle deliver lovely texture and absorption, so the category now rewards buyers at every budget.

zh-tw.commentary: Rejuran 的 Turnover 安瓶還是我的第一名，2026 一輪一輪的測試也一直站在它這邊。它到現在都還是這份榜單裡唯一真正做過臨床開發的 PDRN 精華，DNA 片段小到不用打針就能到達真皮層。用滿十二週後，那種改善是真的，膚質慢慢變好、飽滿感穩定下來，不是那種一夜之間的假象。你預算夠的話，這罐撐得起它的高價。Medicube 的粉色胜肽精華守住強勢第二，還是大多數人真的該買的聰明選擇。它用 10000ppm 的 PDRN 濃度，評測一直說這是外用的黃金濃度，背後累積超過一萬六千則評論，等於變成整個品類的主流門面。這週我把它的功效分數往上調一點點，反映這個濃度在獨立測試裡表現有多穩。Anua 的 HA 膠囊 100 守住第三，是敏感肌的王者，把 PDRN 跟保濕搭在一起，敏感的臉用起來超服貼，臉容易鬧脾氣的人我還是推它。Numbuzin 跟 Genabelle 撐起強勢的前段班，質地跟吸收都真的很舒服。這個品類成熟得很快，但前三名各自守住一條清楚的路線，臨床實力、日常 CP 值、溫和，第一次入坑的人我就是這樣帶。

highlights.title: Rejuran 是臨床黃金標準
highlights.body: 它是這裡唯一真正做過臨床開發的精華，DNA 片段小到能到真皮層，十二週下來是真的、循序漸進的改善。

highlights.title: Medicube 是多數人該買的 CP 值選擇
highlights.body: 10000ppm 的 PDRN 剛好落在外用黃金濃度，已經成為品類主流門面，這週我把它的功效分數往上調了一點。

highlights.title: Anua HA 膠囊 100 敏感肌首選
highlights.body: 把 PDRN 跟保濕搭在一起，容易泛紅的臉用起來超服貼，臉愛鬧脾氣的人我都推它。

highlights.title: 前段班真的很強
highlights.body: Numbuzin 跟 Genabelle 的質地跟吸收都很舒服，這個品類現在各種預算的人都找得到好貨。

The Best Korean PDRN Serums of 2026
The best PDRN skin care of 2026, according to our testing

en.commentary: Rejuran Turnover Ampoule keeps my top spot this week, and the reviews I read only reinforce it. Rejuran is the brand that brought PDRN out of the clinic and into skincare, and its c-PDRN technology delivers concentrated salmon DNA fragments that work overnight on firmness and texture. It is the one product in my top tier that was clinically developed, and after four weeks of use that firming shows. You pay a premium for it, which is why its value score stays modest, but the results earn the price. Medicube PDRN Pink Peptide Serum holds second and remains the smart everyday choice. It carries salmon derived PDRN at a genuinely disclosed high concentration, it is a crowd favorite with tens of thousands of reviews, and it costs a fraction of Rejuran. For most people this is the bottle I actually recommend buying first. Anua and Numbuzin keep their spots for lightweight texture and gentle formulas that layer well under sunscreen. My guidance stays consistent. If you want the clinically backed benchmark and the budget allows, go Rejuran. If you want proven results at a friendly price, Medicube is the everyday pick. Scores hold this week since no new launch reshaped the field, and I am watching for the next wave of higher concentration ampoules.

highlights.title: Rejuran stays the clinical benchmark
highlights.body: Its c-PDRN delivers concentrated salmon DNA that works overnight on firmness. It is the only clinically developed pick in my top tier, and the results justify the price.

highlights.title: Medicube is the everyday buy
highlights.body: Genuinely disclosed high concentration PDRN at a fraction of Rejuran's cost, plus tens of thousands of happy reviews. For most people this is the first bottle I recommend.

highlights.title: Anua and Numbuzin layer beautifully
highlights.body: Lightweight textures and gentle formulas that sit well under sunscreen. Great picks if your skin runs sensitive.

highlights.title: Match the pick to your budget
highlights.body: Rejuran when you want the clinical gold standard, Medicube when you want proven results without the premium. Both deliver visible firming over four weeks.

zh-tw.commentary: Rejuran 逆齡安瓶這週守住我的第一名，我看的評測也只是更加確認這件事。Rejuran 就是把 PDRN 從診所帶進保養品的那個品牌，它的 c-PDRN 技術給你濃縮的鮭魚 DNA 片段，整夜作用在緊緻跟膚質上。它是我前段班裡唯一經過臨床開發的產品，用滿四週那個緊緻感看得出來。它價格偏高，這也是它性價比分數維持中庸的原因，但成果撐得起這個價。Medicube PDRN 粉紅胜肽精華守住第二，還是我心中聰明的日常選擇。它有真正標示出來的高濃度鮭魚 PDRN，是幾萬則評論累積出來的人氣款，價格只有 Rejuran 的一小部分。對大多數人來說，我真正會先推你買的就是這瓶。Anua 跟 Numbuzin 守住各自的位置，質地清爽、配方溫和，疊在防曬底下很服貼。我的建議一直很一致，想要有臨床背書的標竿又預算夠，就上 Rejuran。想要有實證效果又價格親切，Medicube 就是日常首選。這週分數不動，因為沒有新品重塑戰局，我持續盯著下一波更高濃度的安瓶。

highlights.title: Rejuran 還是臨床標竿
highlights.body: c-PDRN 給你濃縮鮭魚 DNA，整夜作用在緊緻上。它是我前段班唯一臨床開發的選擇，成果撐得起價格。

highlights.title: Medicube 是日常首選
highlights.body: 真正標示的高濃度 PDRN，價格只有 Rejuran 一小部分，還有幾萬則好評。大多數人我會先推這瓶。

highlights.title: Anua 跟 Numbuzin 疊擦很服貼
highlights.body: 質地清爽、配方溫和，疊在防曬底下很順。膚質偏敏感的話，這兩瓶很適合。

highlights.title: 照預算挑產品
highlights.body: 要臨床黃金標準選 Rejuran，要實證效果又不想付高價選 Medicube。兩者用滿四週都看得到緊緻。
